title_block.title: Cadenza Rev A D1 - production electrical contract
title_block.comment_1: Pin-correct; sample-gated electromechanics remain DNP until verified

findings.summary: No datasheets directory found and no BOM parts have MPNs. Review is a consistency check only — manufacturer specs cannot be verified.
findings.recommendation: Before reporting 'verified' findings, (1) populate the MPN field on BOM parts, (2) run the datasheet sync skill (digikey, mouser, lcsc, or element14) to download PDFs into ./datasheets/, then re-run analysis. If datasheets are unreachable, state every pin-level and electrical claim as 'per symbol/library' (consistency), not 'verified against datasheet' (correctness).

report_context.impact: Report wording must avoid 'verified' / 'datasheet-confirmed' language for every BOM part — none have manufacturer evidence attached.

findings.summary: U2 pin PGOOD (PGOOD_N) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin PGOOD on U2 (BQ24074RGTR) is connected to net PGOOD_N but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from PGOOD_N to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin PGOOD is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

findings.summary: U2 pin TMR (TMR_SET) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin TMR on U2 (BQ24074RGTR) is connected to net TMR_SET but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from TMR_SET to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin TMR is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

findings.summary: U3 pin PG (PG_3V3_N) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin PG on U3 (TPS63070RNMR) is connected to net PG_3V3_N but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from PG_3V3_N to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin PG is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

findings.description: low-pass RC filter
Net +5V_AUDIO carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

findings.summary: Net AMP_EN: 5.0V / 3.3V domain crossing without level shifter
findings.description: Net AMP_EN connects ICs in 5.0V and 3.3V domains. The 5.0V output may exceed the 3.3V input absolute maximum rating of 3.6V, risking damage.
findings.recommendation: Add a level shifter between the 5.0V and 3.3V domains on net AMP_EN, or verify that the connected ICs have tolerant inputs.

report_context.impact: Risk of damage or unreliable logic levels

findings.summary: Lifecycle audit not run — --lifecycle flag not passed
findings.description: Component lifecycle / obsolescence audit was not run this session. Reason: --lifecycle flag not passed (run with --lifecycle to query DigiKey / Mouser / LCSC / element14 for obsolescence + operating-temp coverage; requires network + API keys). The review cannot report active / NRND / EOL / obsolete status, last-time-buy windows, or operating-temperature coverage for any BOM part. Treat the lifecycle section of the report as 'not performed'.
findings.recommendation: Run with --lifecycle (requires DIGIKEY_CLIENT_ID / MOUSER_SEARCH_API_KEY / ELEMENT14_API_KEY env vars; LCSC needs no auth) to populate this section. If intentionally skipped, note it explicitly in the report's 'Not Performed' section.

report_context.impact: No obsolescence / temperature-grade evidence available.

observations: +3V3_MAIN: highest SRF is 19.02 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
VBAT: highest SRF is 1.90 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
VSYS: highest SRF is 1.90 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
VBUS: highest SRF is 1.90 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
+5V_MEDIA: highest SRF is 1.28 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
+5V_LCD: highest SRF is 19.02 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
+5V_AUDIO: highest SRF is 19.02 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
VBAT_SENSE: highest SRF is 6.02 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage

observations: Always-on current: 41.3 uA (0.04 mA)
Conditional current (pull-ups, worst-case): 1767.3 uA (1.77 mA)
Realistic sleep estimate: 1767.3 uA (1.77 mA)
1 regulator(s) always enabled: U2
2 regulator(s) with controlled enable
9 single-use passive values — consider standardizing to reduce BOM line items
No test points found in design
No debug connectors (SWD/JTAG/UART) identified
Key nets without test points: 3 i2c, 8 power_rail, 2 uart
Moderate assembly complexity (score 41/100)
4 hard-to-solder component(s) (0201/0402/BGA/QFN)
6 USB compliance check(s) passed
2 USB check(s) informational (optional)

top_issues.summary: U2 pin PGOOD (PGOOD_N) missing pull-up resistor
top_issues.description: Pin PGOOD on U2 (BQ24074RGTR) is connected to net PGOOD_N but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from PGOOD_N to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin PGOOD is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

top_issues.summary: +5V_AUDIO has no declared source
top_issues.description: Net +5V_AUDIO carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

top_issues.summary: No datasheets directory found and no BOM parts have MPNs. Review is a consistency check only — manufacturer specs cannot be verified.
top_issues.recommendation: Before reporting 'verified' findings, (1) populate the MPN field on BOM parts, (2) run the datasheet sync skill (digikey, mouser, lcsc, or element14) to download PDFs into ./datasheets/, then re-run analysis. If datasheets are unreachable, state every pin-level and electrical claim as 'per symbol/library' (consistency), not 'verified against datasheet' (correctness).

top_issues.summary: Sourcing blocker: BOM has <50% MPN coverage (0/38 unique parts). Board is not pre-fab ready.
top_issues.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).
